title: ghosttyのプラグインを導入したい。https://github.com/manaflow-ai/cmux
summary_text: OK, 1 terminal de daijobu. ima no `mas get` wo tomesazu ni kenshou suru houhou: 1. `Ctrl+Z` 2. `bg` 3. shinchoku kakunin: ```bash watch -n 10 'ls -lh /var/folders/11/lypf_v3j7m56cbyysbq__yf80000gn/C/com.apple.appstore/497799835/wgr3515340167444363102.pkg' ``` 4. kakunin owattara `Ctrl+C` de `watch` wo tomete、`fg` de `mas get` ni modoru point: - size ga fuete ireba seijou - 5~10 fun fuenakereba `Ctrl+C` de `mas get` o yamete mou ichido jikkou
